name: Z-Scored Full Consensus
hypothesis: The 'full consensus' formula from iter003 is powerful (WR 95.6%, Exp +7.01 bps). By standardizing this value with a z-score and triggering only on extreme readings (>2.5), we can isolate the highest-conviction signals, potentially increasing both win rate and expectancy beyond the previous peak.
mutation_note: Based on feedback for iter004_full_consensus_high_vol and proposal from signal-improver. Replaced the static threshold of the parent formula with a dynamic z-score to implement the 'extreme_quantile' strategy.
